title: FSH_Task_Object
description: Canonical task contract for the FSH Command Center. v1.0.1 — adds task_type, priority, parent_task_id, idempotency_key, expires_at, context_artifacts, retry_policy. All missing fields from v1.0.0 architecture review are resolved here.

schema_version.description: Semver string. Adapters must reject tasks with unsupported schema versions and log to schema_errors table.

task_type.description: Workflow identifier. Examples: gridline_daily_review, seller_outreach_draft, lead_scoring_batch, buyer_packet_build, content_script_gen, sop_extraction, signal_analysis. REQUIRED — was absent from v1.0.0, causing Phase 1 validation failures.

pillar.description: Business pillar. Controls default compliance flags, approval level, and storage targets via PILLAR_DEFAULTS.

objective.description: Human-readable task objective. Shown in approval gate notifications and audit trail entries.

priority.description: Task queue priority. 1=critical (time-sensitive Gridline deals, Trading alerts), 2=normal, 3=low (background jobs, reporting). Workers pull ORDER BY priority ASC, created_at ASC FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED.

parent_task_id.description: UUIDv4 of parent task. Enables subtask chains: e.g., lead_scoring → seller_outreach_draft → approval → send. Required for Content pillar split-execution model (generation task → distribution task).

idempotency_key.description: Prevents duplicate task creation during retry storms. REQUIRED when compliance_flags contains 'external_action' or 'financial'. FSH Command returns HTTP 409 Conflict on duplicate idempotency_key submissions.

input_artifacts.description: Artifact IDs or URLs that are CONSUMED/mutated by this task.

context_artifacts.description: READ-ONLY reference artifacts. Not consumed — used for context only (e.g., buy_box config, compliance templates, prior lead scores). Added in v1.0.1 to distinguish from input_artifacts.

required_outputs.description: Expected output artifact types or identifiers.

approval_level.description: 0=no gate, 1=notify only (operator informed but not blocked), 2=require explicit human approval before any external action proceeds.

execution_engine.description: Primary runtime adapter. For Content pillar split-execution, the parent task uses 'claude' (generation) and spawns a child task with 'hermes' (distribution). See parent_task_id.

storage_targets.description: Artifact persistence targets. Postgres is ALWAYS the synchronous primary. Notion and Git are async secondaries via retry_queue. If Postgres fails, halt entire operation.

deadline.description: SOFT deadline — operator alert is sent if task is not completed by this time. Does not auto-reject. See expires_at for hard expiry.

expires_at.description: HARD expiry — task is auto-rejected and logged to audit_trail if not processed by this time. Critical for Gridline: deals have hard expiry windows (e.g., 48h after distress signal detection). Added in v1.0.1.

compliance_flags.description: Compliance requirements. Any flag here forces a Claude compliance REVIEW before HANDOFF. 'external_action' + 'financial' require idempotency_key. 'rcw_18_85' requires rcw_status != 'not_reviewed' on associated lead record.

retry_on.description: Error types that trigger retry. 'compliance_failure' should NOT be in retry_on — it requires human review.

retry_policy.description: Per-task retry configuration. After max_attempts, task moves to dead_letter_queue. Added in v1.0.1.
